parameters.name: file
parameters.label: Substance Designer File
parameters.description: Specify the .sbsar material file from Substance Designer.

parameters.name: graph
parameters.label: Graph
parameters.description: Specify which graph in the file to use. See for more details.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Choose what the output of the will be. Grid Preview can be used to see all the texture maps inside the material at once.

parameters.name: invertnormal
parameters.label: Invert Normal Map
parameters.description: Inverts the normal map coming from the sbsar file. This parameter should be used when the normal map in the sbsar is -Y (DirectX) since normal map usage in TouchDesigner expects the normal map as Y+ (

parameters.name: engine
parameters.label: Engine
parameters.description: Select the Substance Engine used for rendering. The engine has much lower render times and is the default engine, while the CPU is included as a legacy mode and was the engine used in TouchDesigner ve

examples.label: Configure Graph and resolutionw
examples.description: Common settings from 6 real Derivative examples
